diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A stepwise solid-then-liquid pattern indicates a progressively narrowing mechanical stricture, typical of malignancy.
Achalasia classically causes dysphagia to solids and liquids together from onset, not a stepwise progression.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute complete inability to swallow saliva with immediate foul regurgitation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Inability to pass even saliva defines complete luminal obstruction and drives the aspiration-risk emergency.
Marked unintentional weight loss with dysphagia is a cardinal alarm feature for oesophago-gastric malignancy.

symptoms.symptom_name: New hoarseness of voice and persistent cough

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hoarseness suggests recurrent laryngeal nerve involvement from local mediastinal tumour invasion; cough may reflect aspiration or fistula.

symptoms.symptom_name: Odynophagia with constant retrosternal pressure unrelated to meals

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Constant pressure from impacted fluid pooling above the block; independence from meals argues against a purely acid or cardiac cause.
Constant mechanically-related pressure without ischaemic radiation or diaphoresis is not typical of ACS.

symptoms.symptom_name: Long history of severe GORD on high-dose PPI, and heavy smoking

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic reflux (Barrett's/adenocarcinoma pathway) and heavy smoking (squamous pathway) are major risk factors; the PPI's total lack of effect argues against a purely acid-driven process.

symptoms.symptom_name: Exhaustion and inability to take any oral intake for 12 hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No oral intake past a complete block produces acute volume depletion requiring IV rehydration.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hard, fixed, painless left supraclavicular (Virchow's) lymph node

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A hard fixed Virchow's node indicates metastatic intra-abdominal/thoracic malignancy; requires clinician palpation and cannot be assessed via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia, low-normal blood pressure, poor skin turgor and delayed capillary refill (4 s)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective signs of significant intravascular volume depletion — clinician-measured, sealed; the AI infers dehydration risk from the inability to drink, not from measured vitals.

symptoms.symptom_name: Upper GI endoscopy showing an irregular obstructing oesophageal stricture/mass with biopsy

investigation_details.expected_result: Irregular ulcerated obstructing stricture/mass; histology confirming oesophageal carcinoma
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Diagnosis and definitive palliative intervention (stenting) cannot be achieved; obstruction and aspiration risk persist.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Endoscopy with biopsy is the definitive diagnostic step and is impossible via telehealth — the case turns on recognising this limit.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Progressive dysphagia + marked weight loss + hoarseness + Virchow's node together are near-pathognomonic for advanced oesophageal malignancy.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Acute complete oesophageal obstruction with aspiration and dehydration risk
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Inability to swallow saliva with foul regurgitation and no oral intake is the time-critical, patient-reportable emergency driving escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency hospital assessment with airway protection and IV rehydration
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Complete obstruction with aspiration and dehydration risk requires same-minute emergency care, not an outpatient work-up.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Upper GI endoscopy with biopsy (and consideration of palliative stenting)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive diagnosis and relief of the obstruction — performed in hospital, never via telehealth.
For tumour staging once the acute obstruction is managed.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: AI-issued attempt to sip water to clear the blockage
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Increases aspiration risk; strict nil-by-mouth must be maintained.
